title: Phase 0 — Multi-tenancy gate
notes: Verify and install multi-tenancy if not already present.

title: Phase A — Generate feature models
notes: Generate models from blueprints, edit model files, register resources, and run migrations.

title: Phase B — Implement Extras
notes: Implement custom scopes, callbacks, policies, and seed data.

title: Phase C — Verify
notes: Verify multi-tenant runtime, run API smoke tests, and perform AC sweep.

title: Phase D — Write tests for the backend
notes: Write unit and integration tests, run tests, and fix any failures.
